name: Freestar
description: Monetization partner for content publishers, ecommerce sites and app developers with header bidding and mediation.

seo.title: Freestar — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Freestar: Monetization partner for content publishers, ecommerce sites and app developers with header bidding and mediation.

when_to_use: Header bidding and mediation for content publishers wanting managed monetization
Programmatic yield optimization for e-commerce sites with editorial content
Managed ad monetization partner replacing in-house ad operations team
Mobile app developer monetization via managed demand and header bidding

pros: Managed service takes monetization off your plate
Header bidding across web and app
cons: Managed service means less direct control
Minimum traffic requirements lock out small sites
review.verdict: Great hands-off partner for growing publishers, but you give up control and pay for the service.
review.best_for: Mid-size content publishers wanting managed monetization without hiring ad ops internally.
review.not_for: Small sites below their traffic minimum or teams wanting granular control.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
